calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2024 Set For Trial On Jun-02-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open Court, PLaintiff's counsel Ms. Eunice Chang informs the staff attorney she does not contest the tentative ruling and submits a proposed order for the Court's review.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KEVIN LEONG , INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE SUI NGAN LEE LEONG TRUST, FENG JIN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden and show that any claim in the complaint arise out of protected activity of service of the Notice. Plaintiff's claims arise, inter alia, out of Defendant's decision to demand the rent in violation of CC 1942.4 and demand rent for the months for which Defendant had previously acknowledged the receipt of payment. While these decisions and breaches of the law are evidenced by the notices, the service of the notices does not form the basis of the claim. Since the first prong has not been met, the Court will not address the second prong. The Court notes that the complaint is inartfully pleaded and is confusing.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501)
